subcodes.first_line: The Book inscribed by this, My Pen, the Pen of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and the Tablet traced by this, My Reed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مرقوم من ای قلم من قلم الله المهیمن القیوم و لوح مسطور من ای یراعه من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
